text: Search for the latest news about the EU AI Act
notes: Clearly news-oriented with 'latest news' phrasing; use news_search not web_search

text: Find me pictures of the Northern Lights
notes: 'Pictures' clearly maps to image_search

text: What is the capital of New Zealand?
notes: Simple factual query mapping to web_search

text: Show me photos of the new iPhone 17 design
notes: 'Photos' signals image_search; product imagery query

text: Get me the breaking news on the earthquake in Japan
notes: 'Breaking news' clearly maps to news_search

text: How do I implement a binary search tree in Python?
notes: Technical how-to question, web_search is appropriate

text: Find images of Art Deco architecture from the 1930s
notes: Historical visual reference; image_search with style and era filters

text: What's the latest on the US-China trade negotiations?
notes: 'Latest' on an ongoing geopolitical topic maps to news_search

text: Look up the best restaurants in Lisbon
notes: General recommendation query; web_search is most appropriate

text: Search for stock photos of remote work setups
notes: 'Stock photos' is explicit image search intent

text: What are the headlines today?
notes: 'Headlines today' maps to news_search with current date

text: Find me the documentation for the Stripe payments API
notes: Developer doc lookup via web_search

text: Get me recent news about SpaceX Starship launches
notes: 'Recent news' maps to news_search with SpaceX Starship as query

text: Find recent news about climate summit outcomes and then search for related charts and infographics
notes: Step 1: news_search for climate summit; Step 2: image_search for related visual data

text: Look up how to make sourdough bread and then find some appealing photos of it
notes: Step 1: web_search for recipe/instructions; Step 2: image_search for visual reference

text: Search the news for the latest product launches from Tesla, then find me images of those vehicles
notes: news_search first to identify products, then image_search using those product names

text: Google what the Eiffel Tower looks like at night and show me some pictures too
notes: Both informational (web_search) and visual (image_search) are explicitly requested

text: Find me a web tutorial on watercolor painting techniques and then search for example watercolor artworks
notes: Sequential: tutorial text first, then visual examples

text: Search the news for the winner of the Booker Prize this year and then find me a photo of the author
notes: news_search yields winner name; image_search uses that name to find author photo

text: Look up what React Server Components are and then find me any news about their adoption
notes: Step 1: web_search for technical concept explanation; Step 2: news_search for adoption coverage

text: Find today's top tech headlines and then search for more detailed articles about the most prominent story
notes: news_search for headlines; use top result to formulate web_search for deeper coverage

text: Search for reviews of the Sony WH-1000XM6 headphones and then find product images
notes: Sequential: web_search for reviews, then image_search for product visuals

text: Find current news on the housing market crash and look up historical images from 2008 for comparison
notes: news_search for current events; image_search for historical visual context

text: Search for what caused the 2010 Deepwater Horizon disaster and then find any recent news about its aftermath
notes: web_search for historical cause; news_search for recent developments

text: Find recent news about NASA's Artemis mission and search for images from the missions
notes: Parallel or sequential: news for updates and images for visuals

text: Search for something about AI
notes: Extremely vague: no specific aspect of AI, no tool preference clear. Should ask: news, images, or general info?

text: Look up Taylor Swift
notes: Ambiguous intent: biography? news? images? tour dates? Should clarify what aspect is needed

text: Find stuff about the Olympics
notes: Unclear tool: news, images, or general web search? Also unclear which Olympics year

text: Search for the conference
notes: Completely underspecified: which conference? What information about it? Should ask for clarification

text: Can you find me some content about climate change?
notes: 'Content' is ambiguous — articles, images, news, videos? Reasonable default is web_search

text: Show me something about that new movie
notes: 'That new movie' is unresolvable without context; needs clarification on movie title

text: Find me the latest updates
notes: 'Latest updates' suggests news but no topic given; completely underspecified

text: Search for photos from the event last weekend
notes: 'The event' is vague; which event? image_search is likely intent but query is unresolvable

text: Look up information on the merger
notes: 'The merger' is unresolvable without context; also unclear if news or general search

text: Find me pictures of the place we talked about
notes: Tool is clear (image_search) but subject is completely missing — no conversational context

text: Search for the CEO's background
notes: 'The CEO' is ambiguous; needs company or name to proceed with web_search

text: Get me some info on that startup that was in the news
notes: No startup name provided; cannot search without it. Should prompt for clarification

text: Find me something interesting to read
notes: Extremely open-ended; no topic, no format preference. Agent should ask about interests or category

text: Search the web for the best hiking trails in Patagonia and also find me some stunning photos of the region
notes: Both tools run simultaneously: web_search for trail info, image_search for visuals

text: Give me the latest tech news and show me images of the most buzzed-about gadgets right now
notes: Parallel: news_search for headlines, image_search for gadget visuals

text: Find me news about the World Cup and images from the games
notes: Both explicitly requested simultaneously

text: Search for how photosynthesis works and also find me diagrams illustrating the process
notes: Parallel: web_search for explanation text, image_search for diagrams

text: Pull up the latest news on Ukraine and images from the front lines simultaneously
notes: 'Simultaneously' is explicit; two tools run in parallel

text: Search for Python async tutorials and find related news about Python 4 release
notes: Different search types for same language ecosystem; can run in parallel

text: Get news on three topics at once: crypto regulations, AI safety, and space exploration
notes: Three parallel news_search calls for three distinct topics

text: Find me web articles about minimalist interior design and also image inspiration boards on the same topic
notes: Parallel web and image search for the same topic

text: Search for the history of CRISPR gene editing and find me any recent news about its applications
notes: Historical info (web_search) and recent developments (news_search) run in parallel

text: Look up Rome travel guides and find me pictures of the Colosseum and Vatican at the same time
notes: Parallel: travel guide content and visual inspiration

text: Search for the definition of blockchain, find me images of blockchain architecture diagrams, and get the latest blockchain news
notes: All three search tools run simultaneously for the same topic

text: Find me news about the stock market crash and web articles explaining what caused it
notes: Both news context and analytical explanation needed in parallel
